arts.sum: Swansea were humbled by arch-rivals Cardiff on Saturday, conceding three goals in the first 22 minutes of the second half en-route to a 3-0 away defeat. Luke Williams will be desperate to produce a re...

arts.ttl: Preview: Swansea City vs. Sheffield United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's Championship clash between Swansea City and Sheffield United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
